title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・Der Stolz

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash kneels before me and her parents to
show her respect and admiration after taking first
place at the Tokyo Racecourse—the very same
track where she won the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her parents are thrilled with her victory and tell
her how proud they are.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her goal achieved, Eishin Flash is filled with
excitement for her final challenge—the Arima
Kinen. And although I, too, am excited...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...I decide to draft up a schedule for her that
extends past the Arima Kinen in the hope that
she'll continue to run.
